visa_types.name: National (D) visa for the purpose of employment
visa_types.visa_fees:
[svk > mys > en > Table:National (D) visa for the purpose of employment > Visa Fees 1]
The above-mentioned Visa Fee is to be paid in Cash or by Debit/Credit Card.
VFS Service charge:
Applicants applying at the Visa Application Centre shall be levied a service charge of 45 Euros (inclusive tax) payable in MYR 216 in cash or by Debit/Credit Card.
Please Note:
- The child between 0 - 12 years on the date of submission at VFS are Biometric exempt.
- The applicable visa fee in Malaysia Ringgit is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice.
- The Visa fee and service charges are non-refundable in case the visa is refused.
visa_types.processing_time: From the date of receipt of application at the Embassy of Slovakia, it takes 15-45 working days to process the visa application. The duration of days when the application is in transit between the Visa Application Centre and the Embassy are not counted.
visa_types.overview:
Overview
Individual travelling to Slovakia with the purpose of employment more than 90 days can apply
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Individual travelling to Slovakia with the purpose of employment more than 90 days can apply

## Visa Fees

[svk > mys > en > Table:National (D) visa for the purpose of employment > Visa Fees 1]
The above-mentioned Visa Fee is to be paid in Cash or by Debit/Credit Card.
VFS Service charge:
Applicants applying at the Visa Application Centre shall be levied a service charge of 45 Euros (inclusive tax) payable in MYR 216 in cash or by Debit/Credit Card.
Please Note:
- The child between 0 - 12 years on the date of submission at VFS are Biometric exempt.
- The applicable visa fee in Malaysia Ringgit is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice.
- The Visa fee and service charges are non-refundable in case the visa is refused.

## Documents Required
Document Checklist – Click here

## Photo Specifications
Please provide one recent colour photograph (not more than 6 months old) of yourself, meeting the following requirements:
- Taken against a light (white or off-white) background so that features are distinguishable and contrast against the background.
- Clear quality and with the face in focus
- Full face: non-smiling, no sunglasses, no hat/cap or any head covering, unless the applicant wears such items because of his/her religious belief or ethnic background
- Printed on normal photographic paper (camera print)
- Please stick the photograph on the Visa Application Form
If the photographs presented do not meet these requirements (click here), then the visa application will be considered incomplete and applicant will be asked to take new photographs in the photo booth in the visa application centre. 

## Processing Time
From the date of receipt of application at the Embassy of Slovakia, it takes 15-45 working days to process the visa application. The duration of days when the application is in transit between the Visa Application Centre and the Embassy are not counted.

## Online Form
You will need to complete the online application form to submit your application.
To fill the form online – Click here (https://ezov.mzv.sk/e-zov/?siteLanguage=en)

- The child between 0 - 12 years on the date of submission at VFS are Biometric exempt.

- The Visa fee and service charges are non-refundable in case the visa is refused.

- Taken against a light (white or off-white) background so that features are distinguishable and contrast against the background.
